programme.title: Forks Over Knives

programme.title: Blue World Ep811: Jojo the Friendly Dolphin + Gator Hole Cave in the Turks Caicos Islands
programme.desc: Jonathan, Blue World's host, and his enitre family travel to the Turks Caicos Islands in search of a famous local celebrity—Jojo the friendly dolphin. Then Blue World explores a hidden cave—keeping an eye out for the alligators, for which it’s named!

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep209: Boating New York City’s Waters with Scientist Neil deGrasse Tyson as Tour Guide
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, cruises the waters of New York City with Neil deGrasse Tyson as his personal tour guide.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep124: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from Xiamen, China
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour heads to a new location, Xiamen, China, for Round 5 with the Grand Prix of Xiamen.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep312: World Sail Racing Tour + Cliff Diving + Canoe Team Challenge
programme.desc: Event Highlights from the RC44 Sailing World Tour Stop in Portoroz, Slovenia + Cliff Diving's 5 Basic Dives + The Sickline Canoeing Team Challenge from Canada.

programme.title: Xplash Ep104
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. Today we'll take an airboat ride in Florida to check out alligators, wakeboard through Bangkok's floating marketplace, and begin with a stormy yacht ride in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep107: Sharks at Palau’s Blue Corner + Denver’s High-Altitude Shark Aquarium
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with an amazing array of sharks at Palau’s Blue Corner, shows how sharks adapt in Denver’s High-Altitude Aquarium and takes a Deeper Dive with Spiny Dogfish Sharks.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Hero's of Marathon
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy is in the Florida Keys fishing for snapper, kingfish and tuna with Neil of Heroes On The Water. Putting them on the fish is Captain Mike Taute.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep211: California’s Channel Islands by Sea Kayak and Stand-Up Paddleboard
programme.desc: We explore Southern California's stunning Channel Islands and the surrounding area by sea kayak and stand-up paddleboard.

programme.title: Sharks of the Coral Canyon
programme.desc: Sharks of the Coral Canyon highlights how sharks and coral reefs are intricately linked. The film features first-time-ever footage of sharks hunting at night, as well as new shark hunting behavior. Corals and sharks depend on one another, and must be protected together if either of them is to survive into the future.

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 1: Don’t Lie Down
programme.desc: In 1953, W. Horace Carter won the Pulitzer Prize for his editorials opposing the KKK. This brave work lead to the FBI’s takedown of the Carolina Klans. Today, The Carters continue to champion civil rights and the environment. Grandson Wes Carter now fights for the world’s waterways. Don’t lie down.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Fight Stars

programme.title: Fight Stars

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro

Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Jumping International de Dinard - Tropicana Derby of Dinard
programme.desc: The mythical Tropicana Derby is one of the categories inside the Jumping International de Dinard, and it offers a combination of traditional and natural fences over a particularly long distance of 1100m that will bring both horse and rider to their limit. Relive the best moments of Dinards Tropicana Derby with a jumping height over 1.45m.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E09 - The End
programme.desc: In the exciting season finale, Chris lays it all on the line one last time while bear hunting. Casey must finish one final task to make the fruits of their labor worthwhile. As the brothers inch closer to safety, they wonder what the future holds.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E10 - Reca
programme.desc: Dive deep into the season of Dropped as the brothers recap an epic 30 day adventure through the Canadian Bush.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E01 - Back In The Brooks
programme.desc: For the first time in years, the Keefer Brothers set foot on the gravel roads of remote Alaska.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E04 - Celebration
programme.desc: Another 5 Star meal from the Ewing Family. This time it is a dinner for some local natives. Bradley decides to go on a hunt for a goat for the first course of slow braised goat ragout, followed by a fish risotto, and for the main course - curried goat with apple and rose hip chutney and to complete the dinner a chocolate molten lava cake for desert.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E05 - Fisherman's Catch
programme.desc: Bradley is looking to give a group of fishermen an unusual dinner - something totally unexpected. On the menu: sea snails followed by an ambitious sea cucumber dish and for the main course a Dungeness Crab Risotto.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E06 - Alutiq Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Game On for the Ewing Family as they plan a dinner to celebrate the 20th Anniversary of the AlutIq Museum. On the menu: clam fritters with kelp, kelp with rhubarb and cranberry jam, game meat with horse-radish mash potatoes with mushrooms, asparagus and leeks. The challenge is on to produce a memorable dinner from local ingredients for the Alutiq people and presenting it in a way that they have never had it before.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E07 - Bush Pilot's Birthday
programme.desc: A Bush Pilot's Birthday warrants a treat of a menu with pacific spot prawns and pasta to kick off this episode's menu followed by duck breast with celery root and for the main course there is rabbit and carrots.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E01 - Into the High Lonesome
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller sets off on The Trail with his trusty horse 7, to test his survival skills and pay homage to mountain men of the past. Saying goodbye to his family, Laramy and 7 have to battle the elements, build shelter, live off of the land, and survive a 30-day trek through the backcountry.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E06 - Flood
programme.desc: When the levee breaks, the stuff really hits the fan…. Desperate Hours looks at some of the most devastating floods in history including the flood of Rio De Janeiro in Brazil, the Louisiana floods in the United States, the Hamburg floods in Germany, the Uttarakhand floods in North India, and the Indian Ocean tsunami in Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E07 - Geological Disasters
programme.desc: Sometimes, all that it takes is a shift underfoot…. Desperate Hours looks at major geological disasters including avalanches in Afghanistan, Pakistan, Nepal, Peru, and France. It also looks at geological landslides in the Philippines, India and Columbia and an enormous sinkhole that consumed a pond in Bosnia. It also looks at Blizzards in the United States, Israel, and United Kingdom.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E08 - Nuclear Industrial
programme.desc: When humans are a serious danger to themselves ... Desperate Hours looks at nuclear and industrial disasters including the Fukushima Nuclear Power Plant disaster in Japan, the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant disaster in Ukraine, the Deepwater Oil Spill in the Gulf of Mexico, the Savar Plaza disaster in Bangladesh, and the Bhopal Gas disaster in India. When a catastrophic event strikes a nuclear power facility the resulting disaster can be, literally, off the scale and last for decades.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E09 - Disaster at Sea
programme.desc: Seafaring is a dangerous business indeed…… Desperate Hours looks at major disasters on the high seas including the Sewol Ferry disaster in South Korea, the Ferry Estonia in the Baltic Sea, the sinking of the Titanic, the Exxon Valdez in Prince William Sound Alaska, the Express Samina in Portes Islets, pirates attacking the Maersk Alabama and Seabourn Spirit, and the Costa Concordia in the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: Everything Always All the Time
programme.desc: What happens when your girlfriend suddenly has a penis?

programme.title: Lost in the Living
programme.desc: A young Irish musician immerses himself into Berlin nightlife after a concert and loses more than just his friends in the process.

programme.title: Mann im Spagat- Pace, Cowboy, Pace
programme.desc: A delightfully absurd Berlin comedy about bicycle messengers, new age esoterica, and saving the world.
A young woman ventures into the deadly beauty of the Chernobyl exclusion zone to save her father from prison.

programme.title: Paradies! Paradies!
programme.desc: Kurdwin Ayub, a member of the European Film Academy, tries to find out why his father falls into euphoria at the very mention of Kurdistan.

programme.title: Hashtag: School Trip
programme.desc: A school class visits the Auschwitz concentration camp in Poland. Buckle up in the bus, go to the toilet, a birthday song for Anja.

programme.title: Zero-G
programme.desc:
"I'm a city kid - born in the smog." Delicately and with great poetry a group of young parcours artists recapture the urban space of their home city of Vienna.
Political art in public space – completely weightless. Accompanied by the gentle sounds of the poetry slammer Fatima Moumouni.

programme.title: Music

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: Error 113
programme.desc: Cuatro extraños se encuentran en el apartamento 113 invitados por Annie Annie, una aplicación de inteligencia artificial que ayuda a las personas con sus problemas cotidianos. Annie Annie les ha dicho que la aplicación es en realidad una persona real y que se van a encontrar cara a cara. Después de un tiempo, estos extraños comienzan a sentirse incómodos a medida que se dan cuenta de que Annie no va a poder hacerlo.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Error 113
programme.desc: Cuatro extraños se encuentran en el apartamento 113 invitados por Annie Annie, una aplicación de inteligencia artificial que ayuda a las personas con sus problemas cotidianos. Annie Annie les ha dicho que la aplicación es en realidad una persona real y que se van a encontrar cara a cara. Después de un tiempo, estos extraños comienzan a sentirse incómodos a medida que se dan cuenta de que Annie no va a poder hacerlo.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Martí Noticias
programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
